title: PteroControl
description: PteroControl is a powerful, client-side Minecraft mod that seamlessly integrates your Pterodactyl game server panel directly into the multiplayer screen. Manage your servers without ever leaving the game!
body:
Tired of alt-tabbing to a web browser just to start, stop, or restart your Pterodactyl-hosted game server? **PteroControl is the solution!**

This powerful, client-side utility mod seamlessly integrates your Pterodactyl panel directly into Minecraft's multiplayer screen, giving you essential server controls right where you need them.

Watch a short video about the features in the gallery.
---

## ✨ Key Features

* **In-Game Server Controls:** Adds **Start**, **Stop**, and **Restart** buttons directly to your server entries in the multiplayer list.
* **Smart Display:** Buttons only appear for servers that match the **configurable node address**, keeping your server list clean.
* **Dynamic Status:** The buttons are intelligent! They automatically **enable or disable** based on the server's live ping status in Minecraft (Online, Offline, or Pinging) to prevent mistakes.
    * **Offline?** Only the "Start" button is active.
    * **Online?** Only "Restart" and "Stop" are active.
    * **Pinging?** All buttons are temporarily disabled.
* **Automatic Refresh:** After sending a command, the buttons will temporarily disable and then **automatically update** to reflect the server's new state after a few seconds.
* **Easy Configuration:** A simple in-game settings screen (via Mod Menu) lets you set up your Pterodactyl panel URL, API key, and node address in seconds.

---

## ⚙️ How to Set Up

1.  Install the mod and all required dependencies (see below).
2.  Launch Minecraft and go to the **Mods** menu from the main screen.
3.  Find **PteroControl** in the list and click the **gear icon** (⚙️).
4.  Enter your **Pterodactyl Panel URL** (e.g., `https://panel.yourdomain.com`).
5.  Enter your **Client API Key**. This must be generated from your user account's "API Credentials" page on the panel and usually starts with `ptlc_`.
6.  Enter the **Node Address** of your servers (e.g., `node.yourdomain.com`). The buttons will only appear for servers matching this address.
7.  Click **Save**, and you're all set!

---

## ⚠️ Requirements

This mod is for the **Fabric** modloader. It requires the following mods to be installed:

* [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
* [**Mod Menu**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
* [**Cloth Config API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

---
